hero-sub: The Living Script of the Kapampángan People
about-title: Preserving Our Script, Empowering New Learners
about-text: The Kulitan Project is a cultural preservation initiative that brings the ancient Kapampángan script to the digital age. Each word includes its pronunciation, meaning, and written form — bridging heritage and modern technology to guide both native speakers and newcomers.
step1-text: See it in Kulitan script with pronunciation guide.
section-jkka: Join us in keeping Kulitan alive — for the next generation
footercreator: Created by Angelo Torres Máglalang. A Kulitan Preservation Project
footernote: 'Pakamálan ta ya ing kekatamung Amanung Sisuan at ituru ing Kulitan kareng kayanakan.'
how-title: See, Read, Hear, and Understand Kulitan.
how-sub: Explore Kulitan through script, sound, and meaning.
how-see-text: View root words written in authentic Kulitan glyphs.
how-learn-text: Understand roots and how meanings evolve.
about-intro: This platform is built to help preserve and share Kulitan with future learners.
about-mission-text: The mission of this project is to make learning Kulitan simple, visual, and accessible for everyone. Through pictures, clear examples, and modern tools, it guides learners to discover the beauty of the script.
about-story-text: This project was created from a deep love for Kapampangan culture, language, and identity. It is built for those who want to embrace their heritage and for new learners who are curious about the script.
about-importance-text: Kulitan is more than a writing system. It is a living symbol of history and pride. By learning and using it, we help keep the language alive and strengthen our cultural identity.
contact-sub: Have questions or suggestions? Reach out anytime.
contact-details-text: You can send feedback, corrections, or collaboration ideas through the following channels.
contact-social-text: Follow for updates and new features.
contact-support-text: Report issues or suggest improvements here.
dict-sub: Browse Kapampangan words with Kulitan script and illustrations.
